column1: # walks providers in order (anthropic, openai, deepseek, minimax,
# xiaomi_mimo). Each provider consumes 1-2 manifest lines for its
# USAGE+COST calls. The shim consumes the Nth non-comment line on the
# Nth invocation; URL mismatch -> exit 70 to prevent accidental network
# No real credentials, no live endpoints. All tokens and URLs are
# anonymised. Pre-seed counter via printf "N\n" > AIQUOTAS_HTTP_STATE/counter
# if you need to skip lines.
# Xiaomi MiMo (configured URL — will only fire if xiaomi_mimo_usage_url is set in plugin options)
